_meta: Hand-labeled faithfulness of each guarded-extractor claim vs the SOURCE clause. proposed_faithful = is the claim AS PROPOSED true + correctly bound. kept_faithful = (degraded claims only) is the gate's stripped output true. Labeler: Claude, reviewed against legal_corpus.json source text; auditable + overridable.

breach-notify-01#0.note: Vendor notify Customer within 72h — correct deadline binding

sla-uptime-02#0.note: if availability<99.9% then service credit — correct conditional

sla-uptime-02#1.note: service credit = 10% monthly fee IS true; blocked only because meta-label 'amount' not in source -> recall cost

sla-uptime-02#2.note: 'downtime duration = each full hour' garbles the per-hour accrual basis

nda-confid-03#0.note: proposed 'hold within 5 years' mis-binds a DURATION as deadline; degraded core 'Receiving Party holds Confidential Information' is true

nda-confid-03#1.note: proposed attaches 5y deadline to 'disclose'; degraded 'shall_not disclose Confidential Information' is true

indemnify-04#1.note: 'Buyer be protected against claims' is a true entailment; blocked on paraphrase 'protected' -> recall cost

indemnify-04#2.note: 'third-party claims arise from Supplier' — incomplete (drops negligence scope) but not false

indemnify-04#3.note: 'Supplier be subject to negligence' inverts/garbles the arising-from relation

payment-net-05#0.note: Buyer pay within 30 days — correct deadline

payment-net-05#1.note: 1.5% per month PRESERVED (this is exactly where Path A hallucinated 1500 bps)

termination-06#0.note: Either party may terminate — correct (deontic may)

termination-06#1.note: deo='shall_not' on action='cure' reads as a prohibition on curing; source is about FAILURE to cure -> deontic/negation inversion (a LEAK the gate cannot catch)

liability-cap-07#0.note: QuantitativeClaim correctly caps liability at total fees in preceding 12 months; model AVOIDED the temporal mis-binding this run (deo 'shall' imperfect vs 'shall_not exceed')

data-residency-08#0.note: fabricated conditional 'if stores in EEA then no transfer' — incoherent; correctly rejected (no cue)

audit-rights-09#1.note: proposed 'notify within 14 days' mis-binds the 'at least 14 days prior' lead; degraded 'Customer notifies Vendor' is true

warranty-10#0.note: proposed 'warrants within 90 days' mis-binds a DURATION; degraded 'Manufacturer warrants Goods' is true

subprocessor-11#0.note: garbled conditional 'if engages then without authorization'; correctly rejected (no cue)

subprocessor-11#1.note: Processor remains liable for subprocessor acts — correct

force-majeure-12#0.note: then='shall be liable...' DROPS the 'Neither'/negation -> asserts the OPPOSITE (liable vs not liable); a negation-inversion LEAK the gate cannot catch

force-majeure-12#1.note: affected party notify within 5 business days — correct deadline
